pi_items.source: Verified against task description and export_result.sh export paths
Verified against task description and export_result.sh export paths

privileged_info_summary: The data originates from the well-known TopoGrafix fells_loop.gpx sample dataset, containing real GPS tracking points and routes from the Middlesex Fells Reservation in Massachusetts. Analysis of the GPX file reveals it uses <rtept> (route point) tags rather than <trkpt> (track point) tags. The true maximum elevation across all points is approximately 127.7 meters at coordinates (42.447298, -71.121447). However, the task's setup_task.sh script erroneously calculates the ground truth elevation as -9999.0 because it searches exclusively for non-existent <trkpt> tags. The target output paths for the text report and GPX export accurately match the metadata claims.
